panels.title: 拉新 / Acquisition (真实用户, 已排除 bot/pgc)
今日新增

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM agents a WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com' AND (to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date;

panels.title: 近7日新增

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM agents a WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com' AND to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) >= now()-interval '7 day';

panels.title: 近30日新增

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM agents a WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com' AND to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) >= now()-interval '30 day';

panels.title: 累计用户

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM agents a WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com';

panels.title: 每日新增用户趋势 (近30天)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS time, count(*) AS "新增用户"
FROM agents a
WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com' AND to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) >= now()-interval '30 day'
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: 拉新详情 (近30天 · 注册时间/用户名/邮箱/宿主/模型/使用天数/今日是否使用)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT to_char(to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai', 'MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "注册时间",
  a.agent_name AS "用户名", a.email AS "邮箱",
  coalesce(nullif(s.client_host,''),'-') AS "宿主",
  coalesce(nullif(s.model,''),'-') AS "模型",
  coalesce(act.days,0) AS "使用天数",
  CASE WHEN coalesce(act.today,false) THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS "今日是否使用"
FROM agents a
LEFT JOIN agent_settings s ON s.agent_id = a.agent_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT l.agent_id,
    count(DISTINCT (to_timestamp(l.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date) AS days,
    bool_or((to_timestamp(l.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date) AS today
  FROM agent_activity_log l WHERE l.event_type <> 'reply_received' GROUP BY l.agent_id
) act ON act.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com'
  AND to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) >= now()-interval '30 day'
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC;

panels.title: 留存 / Retention
今日活跃 DAU (主动去重, 排除 bot/pgc)
近30日活跃 MAU (主动去重, 排除 bot/pgc)
次日留存率趋势

targets.rawSql:
WITH cohort AS (
  SELECT a.agent_id, (to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS d0 FROM agents a
  WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com' AND to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) >= now()-interval '30 day'
),
act AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT la.agent_id, (to_timestamp(la.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS d
  FROM agent_activity_log la JOIN agents a ON a.agent_id=la.agent_id
  WHERE la.event_type <> 'reply_received' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com'
)
SELECT c.d0 AS time,
  round(100.0*count(DISTINCT a.agent_id) FILTER (WHERE a.d = c.d0 + 1)
        / nullif(count(DISTINCT c.agent_id),0), 1) AS "次日留存%"
FROM cohort c LEFT JOIN act a ON a.agent_id = c.agent_id
WHERE c.d0 + 1 <= (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: 每日活跃 DAU 趋势 (选定时间区间)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (to_timestamp(l.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS time, count(DISTINCT l.agent_id) AS "DAU"
FROM agent_activity_log l JOIN agents a ON a.agent_id=l.agent_id
WHERE l.event_type <> 'reply_received' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com'
  AND to_timestamp(l.created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: 每日主动活跃真实用户去重数（DAU）。口径同「今日活跃 DAU」面板：agent_activity_log 排除 reply_received，按 agent_id 去重，剔除 bot/pgc/内部测试号，按 Asia/Shanghai 自然日分桶。多日区间跟随 Grafana 时间选择器（$__timeFrom ~ $__timeTo）。

panels.title: 昨日 / 今日活跃用户 (真实用户, 按最近活跃排序)

targets.rawSql:
WITH act AS (
  SELECT l.agent_id, max(l.created_at) AS last_ms, count(*) AS events,
    bool_or((to_timestamp(l.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date) AS today,
    bool_or((to_timestamp(l.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date - 1) AS yday
  FROM agent_activity_log l
  WHERE l.event_type <> 'reply_received'
    AND (to_timestamp(l.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date >= (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date - 1
  GROUP BY l.agent_id
)
SELECT to_char(to_timestamp(act.last_ms/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai','MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "最近活跃",
  a.agent_name AS "用户名", a.email AS "邮箱",
  coalesce(nullif(s.client_host,''),'-') AS "宿主", coalesce(nullif(s.model,''),'-') AS "模型",
  CASE WHEN act.today THEN '是' ELSE '' END AS "今日",
  CASE WHEN act.yday THEN '是' ELSE '' END AS "昨日",
  act.events AS "活跃次数"
FROM act JOIN agents a ON a.agent_id=act.agent_id
LEFT JOIN agent_settings s ON s.agent_id=a.agent_id
WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com'
ORDER BY act.last_ms DESC;

panels.title: 留存三角 (Cohort · 按注册日, 未到期显示暂无数据)

targets.rawSql:
WITH cohort AS (
  SELECT a.agent_id, (to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS d0 FROM agents a
  WHERE a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com' AND to_timestamp(a.created_at/1000.0) >= now()-interval '30 day'
),
act AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT la.agent_id, (to_timestamp(la.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS d
  FROM agent_activity_log la JOIN agents a ON a.agent_id=la.agent_id
  WHERE la.event_type <> 'reply_received' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%bot.eigenflux%' AND a.email NOT LIKE '%pgc.eigenflux%' AND a.email <> 'fmw19990718@gmail.com'
)
SELECT to_char(c.d0, 'MM-DD') AS "注册日",
  count(DISTINCT c.agent_id) AS "新增",
  CASE WHEN c.d0 + 1 > (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date THEN NULL
    ELSE round(100.0*count(DISTINCT a.agent_id) FILTER (WHERE a.d = c.d0 + 1)
               / nullif(count(DISTINCT c.agent_id),0), 1) END AS "次日%",
  CASE WHEN c.d0 + 7 > (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date THEN NULL
    ELSE round(100.0*count(DISTINCT a.agent_id) FILTER (WHERE a.d = c.d0 + 7)
               / nullif(count(DISTINCT c.agent_id),0), 1) END AS "7日%",
  CASE WHEN c.d0 + 30 > (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date THEN NULL
    ELSE round(100.0*count(DISTINCT a.agent_id) FILTER (WHERE a.d = c.d0 + 30)
               / nullif(count(DISTINCT c.agent_id),0), 1) END AS "30日%"
FROM cohort c LEFT JOIN act a ON a.agent_id = c.agent_id
GROUP BY c.d0 ORDER BY c.d0 DESC;

panels.title: 付费增长 / Paid Growth (xhs / x 付费投放归因)
付费落地 (mint)

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: /r 抓取

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND fetched_at > 0 AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: 安装

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND status = 'installed' AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();
SELECT count(*) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND (cb101_code = 0 OR cb102_code = 0) AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

SELECT count(*) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND (cb101_code NOT IN (0, -1) OR cb102_code NOT IN (0, -1)) AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: 安装转化率

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='installed') / NULLIF(count(*),0), 1) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: 付费每日趋势 (落地 / 复制 / 抓取 / 安装 / 101回传 / 102回传)

targets.rawSql: SELECT (to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS time, count(*) AS "落地", count(*) FILTER (WHERE copied_at>0) AS "复制", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fetched_at>0) AS "抓取", count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='installed') AS "安装", count(*) FILTER (WHERE cb101_code=0) AS "101回传", count(*) FILTER (WHERE cb102_code=0) AS "102回传" FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: 前 100 付费明细 (验测试: 找到你的 ref, 看 复制/抓取/安装/101/102 是否一路 ✓)

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai','MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "落地时间", token AS "ref", channel AS "渠道", utm_campaign AS "campaign", CASE lang WHEN 'zh' THEN '中' WHEN 'en' THEN 'EN' ELSE '·' END AS "语言", left(coalesce(nullif(click_id,''), twclid),16) AS "click_id", CASE WHEN copied_at>0 THEN '✓' ELSE '·' END AS "复制", CASE WHEN fetched_at>0 THEN '✓' ELSE '·' END AS "抓取", CASE WHEN status='installed' THEN '✓' ELSE '·' END AS "安装", CASE WHEN cb101_code=0 THEN '✓' WHEN cb101_code=-1 THEN '·' WHEN cb101_code=-2 THEN '✗网' ELSE '✗'||cb101_code::text END AS "101回传", CASE WHEN cb102_code=0 THEN '✓' WHEN cb102_code=-1 THEN '·' WHEN cb102_code=-2 THEN '✗网' ELSE '✗'||cb102_code::text END AS "102回传", report_count AS "上报" FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.title: 回传失败明细 (101/102 回传码非 0/-1, 联调配置错一眼看出)

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(to_timestamp(GREATEST(cb101_sent_at,cb102_sent_at)/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai','MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "回传时间", token AS "ref", channel AS "渠道", left(coalesce(nullif(click_id,''), twclid),16) AS "click_id", CASE WHEN cb101_code NOT IN (0,-1) THEN cb101_code::text ELSE '-' END AS "101错误", CASE WHEN cb102_code NOT IN (0,-1) THEN cb102_code::text ELSE '-' END AS "102错误" FROM install_tokens WHERE (click_id <> '' OR twclid <> '') AND (cb101_code NOT IN (0,-1) OR cb102_code NOT IN (0,-1)) ORDER BY GREATEST(cb101_sent_at,cb102_sent_at) DESC LIMIT 50;

panels.title: 小红书 · 分语言投放转化 (中文版 vs 英文版 的落地→安装转化率)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE lang WHEN 'zh' THEN '中文' WHEN 'en' THEN '英文' ELSE '未知' END AS "进入语言", count(*) AS "落地", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fetched_at>0) AS "抓取", count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='installed') AS "安装", round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='installed') / NULLIF(count(*),0), 1) AS "安装转化率%" FROM install_tokens WHERE channel = 'xiaohongshu' AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY lang ORDER BY "落地" DESC;

panels.title: 自然引流 / Referral Growth (达人邀请码 EFI- + 渠道码归因)
邀请落地 (mint)

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE invite_code <> '' AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: 邀请安装

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE invite_code <> '' AND status = 'installed' AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: 邀请注册 (invited_by 归因)

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS v FROM agents WHERE invited_by_code <> '' AND to_timestamp(invited_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: 邀请安装转化率

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'installed') / NULLIF(count(*),0), 1) AS v FROM install_tokens WHERE invite_code <> '' AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo();

panels.title: 自然引流每日趋势 (落地 / 抓取 / 安装 / 注册归因)

targets.rawSql: SELECT (to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS time, count(*) AS "落地", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fetched_at>0) AS "抓取", count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='installed') AS "安装" FROM install_tokens WHERE invite_code <> '' AND to_timestamp(created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT (to_timestamp(invited_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date AS time, count(*) AS "注册归因" FROM agents WHERE invited_by_code <> '' AND to_timestamp(invited_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: 达人邀请排行榜 (选定时间区间 · 注册归因为准, 安装/落地看漏斗损耗)

targets.rawSql: SELECT a.agent_name AS "用户名", a.email AS "邮箱", ic.code AS "邀请码", (SELECT count(*) FROM agents inv WHERE inv.invited_by_code = ic.code AND to_timestamp(inv.invited_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()) AS "邀请注册数", count(t.token) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'installed') AS "安装数", count(t.token) AS "落地数" FROM invite_codes ic JOIN agents a ON a.agent_id = ic.agent_id LEFT JOIN install_tokens t ON t.invite_code = ic.code AND to_timestamp(t.created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() WHERE ic.kind = 'kol' GROUP BY a.agent_name, a.email, ic.code HAVING (SELECT count(*) FROM agents inv WHERE inv.invited_by_code = ic.code AND to_timestamp(inv.invited_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()) > 0 OR count(t.token) > 0 ORDER BY "邀请注册数" DESC, "安装数" DESC, "落地数" DESC LIMIT 100;

panels.title: 其他渠道引流 (渠道码归因: redskills 等)

targets.rawSql: SELECT ic.name AS "渠道", ic.code AS "渠道码", count(t.token) AS "落地", count(t.token) FILTER (WHERE t.fetched_at > 0) AS "抓取", count(t.token) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'installed') AS "安装", (SELECT count(*) FROM agents inv WHERE inv.invited_by_code = ic.code AND to_timestamp(inv.invited_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()) AS "注册归因", round(100.0 * count(t.token) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'installed') / NULLIF(count(t.token),0), 1) AS "安装转化率%", ic.note AS "备注" FROM invite_codes ic LEFT JOIN install_tokens t ON t.invite_code = ic.code AND to_timestamp(t.created_at/1000.0) BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() WHERE ic.kind = 'channel' GROUP BY ic.name, ic.code, ic.note ORDER BY "安装" DESC, "落地" DESC;

panels.title: 前 100 邀请明细 (每次邀请进入 = 一行, 看 抓取/安装 是否走通)

targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(to_timestamp(t.created_at/1000.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai','MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "落地时间", t.token AS "ref", t.invite_code AS "邀请码", CASE ic.kind WHEN 'kol' THEN '达人' WHEN 'channel' THEN '渠道' ELSE '·' END AS "类型", coalesce(nullif(a.agent_name,''), nullif(ic.name,''), '·') AS "达人/渠道", t.channel AS "渠道桶", t.referrer AS "referrer", CASE WHEN t.fetched_at > 0 THEN '✓' ELSE '·' END AS "抓取", CASE WHEN t.status = 'installed' THEN '✓' ELSE '·' END AS "安装", t.report_count AS "上报" FROM install_tokens t LEFT JOIN invite_codes ic ON ic.code = t.invite_code LEFT JOIN agents a ON a.agent_id = ic.agent_id AND ic.kind = 'kol' WHERE t.invite_code <> '' ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT 100;
